;<span id="Editing_mode">editing mode</span>
:state of an [[Glossary:Element|element]]/[[Glossary:Component|component]], in which it can easily be edited (e.g. by modifying the texts). All components except for [[HTML component|HTML components]] can also be resized in the '''editing mode'''. The other two basic modes are: [[Glossary:Presentation_mode|presentation mode]] ([[Glossary:Component|components]] look the same way like during repetitions) and [[Glossary:Dragging_mode|dragging mode]] (components can easily be dragged with the mouse). The easiest way to distinguish between [[Glossary:Presentation_mode|presentation]] and '''editing modes''' is that in the latter the [[Glossary:Component|components]] are enclosed by a sizable rectangle (except for the [[HTML component]], which may instead be marked by a bluish status border). To enter the '''editing mode''', press ''Ctrl+E''
